title: Extracting Product Features from Technical Specifications
scenario: A company wants to extract product features from technical specifications. The specifications include tables with feature descriptions and technical details. The user wants to extract a JSON object with the extracted features and their descriptions.
constraints: Must handle multiple tables with different feature descriptions

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output extracts the correct features and their descriptions
Check if the output preserves the original formatting
Check if the output length is within the specified limit (300 characters)
